origin: Locked roster from ROSTER.md + loyalist-kit.md + heretic-kit.md. 12 roles total (7 Loyalist, 5 Heretic). Composition table in composition.json. Updated 2026-07-18 to add L7 Sanctioned Psyker.
notes: All role IDs are kebab-case. Citizen role ID is the noise-floor and may appear multiple times in a game (see composition.json). All other role IDs are unique per game.

roles.ability: You have no night power. Discuss, vote, read the table, and survive on wit. Sleep (−1 drift) by default.
roles.objective: Loyalist win: reduce Heretic living count to below parity.

roles.ability: Each night, interrogate one player at chosen intensity: T1 Soft (+1 drift, 'story holds / something off / nothing'), T2 Standard (+2 drift, same + zone hint), T3 Brutal (+3 drift, confirmed Heretic or Loyalist). Target's drift zone auto-upgrades effective tier. Effective T2+ vs Orange+ target = Execute on Sight (auto-kill, alignment revealed).
roles.objective: Find the heretics. Stay clean enough to be believed.

roles.ability: Each night, designate one player to protect. If that player is targeted by a night kill, the kill is prevented. You do not learn whether your protection fired.
roles.objective: Keep the conclave alive. Standard Doctor slot, drift-priced.

roles.ability: Each night, receive a qualitative drift hint about one target. Reads drift, not alignment. Cannot catch Heretics who haven't drifted yet. Drift hints carry zone-based noise (T1 = half zone rate).
roles.objective: Sense the warp on people. Punish action, not stealth.

roles.ability: Each night, bodyguard-proxy one player: take the hit for them if they're attacked. The kill lands on you instead. You survive. You and the protected player both learn next day that the proxy fired.
roles.objective: Soak the bullet. Marks you as 'worth attacking' — durable defender slot.

roles.ability: One-shot warp-kill. Once per game, fire a kill on any night. Drift cost on self: +15 flat (lands Psyker at Red zone, 15-19). At Red, any T2+ Interrogator scan triggers Execute on Sight (Psyker dies). No role marker — Psyker looks identical to Murderer from the table's perspective. Crippled Psyker cannot fire the kill (T1+ blocks it).
roles.objective: Land one kill on a Heretic. Survive long enough to fire it. Hide that you fired it.
roles.notes: Locked 2026-07-18 (Heretic + Nicolas). Composition: ships at ≥7p, max 1 per game. Symmetry role to H1 Murderer (hidden killer + drift-priced). At Red zone, the Loyalist Interrogator is the structural threat.

roles.ability: Each night, choose one sermon tier and target. Whisper (−2, daily), Hymn (−5, 2/game), Litany (−10 floored at 0, once/game). Litany rescue: Priest enters Orange, target exits Red. Skilled Priests hold the conclave together; militant ones climb drift.
roles.objective: Cleanse drift. Keep the faithful clean. Don't burn out.

roles.ability: Each night, kill one player. Traditional hidden-killer role. Full Heretic chat access. Sees other Heretics' plans.
roles.objective: Heretic win: achieve parity (Heretic living count ≥ Loyalist living count).

roles.ability: Same UI as Loyalist Priest. Effects inverted: target drift rises instead of falls. Detection requires drift-delta tracking across Priest interventions. Anti-Priest framing rejected 2026-07-06 — replaced with claim-disguise framing.
roles.objective: Hide in the Priest slot. Drift up the table without being seen. Conversion of max-drift players happens via Recruiter, not via sermons.

roles.ability: Once per day, post a message in day chat that the system attributes to a different player of your choice. The forged sender sees the message and must decide whether to publicly correct it (admitting they're the source) or let it stand (lying).
roles.objective: Seed chaos in table-talk. Frame the Loyalist Interrogator. Survive day-phase.

roles.ability: Each night, choose one player to booby-trap (trap expires at sunrise). Any night action performed on the trapped player: actor takes +5 drift extra; action returns false / no result; you get private notification that trap sprung. Silent detection — trapped player doesn't know.
roles.objective: Counter investigators. Read who pokes whom. Survive without acting.

roles.ability: Each night, target one player at Black zone (drift 20) to perform the heretical catalyst. Flip is silent and immediate — victim wakes as Heretic. Failure (target not at Black): silent fail. If Saboteur trapped the target tonight: flip still resolves, but you take +5 drift extra (= +8 total).
roles.objective: Burn max-drift players. Force Heretic parity via conversion, not just kills.
